title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Adobe India Holdings Services in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
